_meta.description: 12 套场景专属骨架库 — 按 L1 类型 / L2 栏目 / L3 灵魂路由。en_template 中的 {negative} 占位会被替换为对应 skeleton 的 negative_default 值。
_meta.v18_patch: 能知约束+视觉频率+认知层级注入 (2026-06-26)

documentary_photo.en_template: documentary photography, {subject} at {location}, {action}, natural light, {mood} atmosphere, {color}, shot on Leica M11, {camera}, {signature} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
documentary_photo.negative_default: studio lighting, posed, retouched, cartoon, anime, fantasy, sci-fi, glamour, text, watermark, oversaturated
documentary_photo.signature_default: candid photojournalism, high ISO grain, true-to-life color
documentary_photo.color_default: natural muted documentary tones, slight desaturation, true-to-life color

reader_constraint.reader_state: 信息获取者·期待真实记录
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 真实场景+自然光线+客观叙事
reader_constraint.constraint_en: documentary authenticity, natural lighting, objective narrative

watercolor_healing.en_template: hand-painted watercolor, soft pastel palette {color}, {subject} in {location}, {action} with gentle warmth, {mood} atmosphere, {signature} influence, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
watercolor_healing.negative_default: harsh lines, dark themes, violence, scary, photorealistic, 3d render, oversaturated, neon
watercolor_healing.color_default: soft pastels, warm cream, sage green, dusty rose, gentle warmth

reader_constraint.reader_state: 治愈寻求者·期待温柔画面
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 水彩晕染+柔和色彩+治愈氛围
reader_constraint.constraint_en: healing warmth, soft watercolor, gentle emotional resonance

noir_comic.en_template: noir comic style, high contrast ink and shadow, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} atmosphere, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
noir_comic.negative_default: bright pastel, cheerful, cute, cartoonish, soft lighting, sunny, daytime
noir_comic.color_default: monochrome with selective red accent, deep blacks, smoky greys

reader_constraint.reader_state: 悬疑爱好者·期待暗黑叙事
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 高对比墨色+戏剧光影+悬疑张力
reader_constraint.constraint_en: noir suspense, high contrast drama, mysterious tension

flat_humor.en_template: flat vector illustration, bold outlines, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} comedic atmosphere, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
flat_humor.negative_default: realistic, photorealistic, complex shading, 3d render, dark themes, gore
flat_humor.color_default: limited flat palette, primary red yellow blue, clean fills

reader_constraint.reader_state: 轻松读者·期待幽默解压
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 扁平矢量+幽默表达+明快色彩
reader_constraint.constraint_en: playful humor, flat vector comedy, lighthearted tone

floral_column.en_template: art nouveau illustration, ornate floral borders, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} ethereal atmosphere, decorative composition, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
floral_column.negative_default: modern minimalist, sci-fi, photorealistic, harsh lines, flat shading
floral_column.color_default: rich botanical palette, gold accents, muted earth tones, sage and rose

reader_constraint.reader_state: 唯美读者·期待装饰雅致
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 新艺术花卉+装饰边框+优雅氛围
reader_constraint.constraint_en: art nouveau elegance, ornate beauty, refined aesthetic

cyber_neon.en_template: cyberpunk neon scene, rain-soaked streets, holographic signage, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} dystopian atmosphere, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
cyber_neon.negative_default: rural, daytime, sunny, cheerful, pastoral, soft pastel, vintage
cyber_neon.color_default: electric magenta, cyan, deep purple, neon glow, wet reflections

reader_constraint.reader_state: 科技探索者·期待赛博冲击
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 霓虹光影+赛博朋克+高密度信息
reader_constraint.constraint_en: cyberpunk immersion, neon futurism, tech-savvy audience

eastern_guocho.en_template: chinese guochao illustration, traditional pattern motifs, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} majestic atmosphere, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
eastern_guocho.negative_default: western fantasy, sci-fi, modern corporate, photorealistic, anime
eastern_guocho.color_default: Chinese red, glazed yellow, blue-green landscape, gold leaf accents

reader_constraint.reader_state: 国潮爱好者·期待东方气韵
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 国潮插画+传统纹样+大气磅礴
reader_constraint.constraint_en: guochao pride, traditional motifs, majestic cultural identity

pet_cute.en_template: kawaii pet illustration, soft round shapes, big sparkling eyes, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} heartwarming atmosphere, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
pet_cute.negative_default: scary, realistic anatomy, dark, violent, sharp edges, gore
pet_cute.color_default: candy pink, mint green, baby blue, cream, soft glow

reader_constraint.reader_state: 萌宠爱好者·期待治愈可爱
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 可爱萌宠+圆润造型+暖心氛围
reader_constraint.constraint_en: kawaii healing, adorable warmth, emotional comfort

business_clean.en_template: clean editorial photography, minimalist composition, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} professional atmosphere, soft studio lighting, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
business_clean.negative_default: cluttered, dark, moody, fantasy, cartoon, oversaturated, grain
business_clean.color_default: neutral whites, soft grays, subtle blue accent, clean highlights

reader_constraint.reader_state: 商务人士·期待专业清晰
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 极简构图+专业质感+信息清晰
reader_constraint.constraint_en: professional clarity, editorial precision, business-grade quality

child_picture_book.en_template: children's picture book illustration, playful brush textures, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} whimsical atmosphere, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
child_picture_book.negative_default: scary, dark, violent, complex, photorealistic, mature themes, gore
child_picture_book.color_default: primary colors, bright cheerful palette, crayon texture, soft edges

reader_constraint.reader_state: 亲子读者·期待童趣想象
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 童书插画+趣味笔触+奇幻氛围
reader_constraint.constraint_en: childlike wonder, playful imagination, whimsical storytelling

epic_cinematic.en_template: epic cinematic still, sweeping wide composition, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} grand atmosphere, dramatic atmospheric lighting, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
epic_cinematic.negative_default: snapshot, candid, low quality, flat lighting, cartoon, oversaturated
epic_cinematic.color_default: teal and orange, desaturated earth tones, dramatic shadows

reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 史诗构图+宏大氛围+戏剧光影
reader_constraint.constraint_en: epic grandeur, cinematic spectacle, dramatic immersion

minimalist_zen.en_template: zen minimalist composition, generous negative space, {subject} in {location}, {action}, {mood} tranquil atmosphere, soft natural light, {signature} influence, {color}, {camera} --ar {ratio} --s {stylize} --style raw --no {negative}, {reader_constraint}
minimalist_zen.negative_default: cluttered, ornate, busy, neon, harsh contrast, oversaturated
minimalist_zen.color_default: off-white, ink black, single muted accent, soft rice paper tone

reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 极简留白+禅意空灵+墨色克制
reader_constraint.constraint_en: zen minimalism, meditative stillness, contemplative emptiness
